prose:
Frontier-orbital gap of water (H₂O) — DFT at tier “standard” (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.

Geometry: taken directly from the supplied XYZ file (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz); no geometry optimization was performed (single-point orbitals on the input geometry).

SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported.

Results (Koopmans-style):
  HOMO (index 4) = –8.6037183 eV
  LUMO (index 5) = +0.33695037 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV

Reproducibility:
  Command: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpovk87ym_/live.json
  JSON output: /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpovk87ym_/live.json
  Method provenance per schema_version 1, integrity.trustworthy = true.
